page.content: In the period spanning 2019 to 2024, the Customer Loyalty Program Metrics for Costco Wholesale exhibit significant engagement and financial impact. The year 2019 recorded 1.5M Active Members, a 30% Engagement Rate, a Sales Growth of 5.6%, and Discounts Offered amounting to £12M.

page.content: In 2020, Active Members increased to 1.6M, with an Engagement Rate of 32%, Sales Growth rising to 6.1%, and Discounts Offered at £13M. The year 2021 saw further growth, with Active Members reaching 1.7M, an Engagement Rate of 34%, Sales Growth of 6.5%, and Discounts Offered increasing to £14M. By 2022, Active Members grew to 1.8M, the Engagement Rate reached 35%, Sales Growth was 7.0%, and Discounts Offered totaled £15M. In 2023, Active Members rose to 1.9M, with a 36% Engagement Rate, Sales Growth of 7.5%, and Discounts Offered at £16M. Projections for 2024 indicate Active Members at 2.0M, an Engagement Rate of 37%, Sales Growth of 8.0%, and Discounts Offered reaching £17M. The average metrics across this period reflect 1.7M Active Members, a 33% Engagement Rate, a Sales Growth of 6.6%, and Discounts Offered averaging £14.5M.

page.content: Sales performance metrics over the years indicate Q1 Sales Growth of 5.2% in 2019, 6.0% in 2020, Q2 at 3.8% in 2019 and 5.5% in 2020, Q3 at 4.5% in 2019 and 7.2% in 2020, and Q4 at 2.9% in 2019 and 4.8% in 2020.
